title: Lunar's Dark Mode
description: Fixes Minecraft's UI's Being So Bright.
body:
# Why I Made This

Minecraft's UI Is WAY TOO BRIGHT (not as bright as discord light mode) but still. Whenever you open your inventory, FLASH BANG, so I fixed that.

# What It Adds

This Pack Will Make EVERY GUI Darker.

# My Socials

Discord: https://discord.gg/txhRenN2KH

Youtube: https://youtube.com/c/@LunarsVoid
